queries: Provide the Arabic Uthmani text for Surah Luqman 31:13 from quranic_verses.json
Surah Luqman 31:12 Arabic Uthmani text quranic_verses.json
Surah Luqman 31:14 Arabic Uthmani text quranic_verses.json
Surah Luqman 31:15 Arabic Uthmani text quranic_verses.json
وَإِذْ قَالَ لُقْمَانُ لِابْنِهِ وَهُوَ يَعِظُهُ يَا بُنَيَّ لَا تُشْرِكْ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّ الشِّرْكَ لَظُلْمٌ عَظِيمٌ quranic_verses.json
وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا لُقْمَانَ الْحِكْمَةَ أَنِ اشْكُرْ لِلَّهِ وَمَنْ يَشْكُرْ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِ quranic_verses.json
وَوَصَّيْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ بِوَالِدَيْهِ حَمَلَتْهُ أُمُّهُ وَهْنًا عَلَى وَهْنٍ quranic_verses.json
وَإِنْ جَاهَدَاكَ عَلَى أَنْ تُشْرِكَ بِي quranic_verses.json
وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا quranic_verses.json
الْحِكْمَةَ أَنِ اشْكُرْ لِلَّهِ وَمَنْ يَشْكُرْ

output.code:
import re, json, textwrap

path = '/mnt/data/file-AdA74towX7aAnJqV92F1MK-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()

spans = []

# Double quotes "
for m in re.finditer(r'\"(.*?)\"', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    spans.append(('double_quote', inner, start, end))

# Arabic ornate parentheses ﴿...﴾
for m in re.finditer(r'﴿(.*?)﴾', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1)
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    spans.append(('ornate', inner, start, end))

# Normal parentheses (...) - only include if content contains Arabic letters and is length >= 10
for m in re.finditer(r'\((.*?)\)', text, flags=re.DOTALL):
    inner = m.group(1).strip()
    if re.search(r'[\u0600-\u06FF]', inner) and len(inner) >= 10:
        start = m.start(1)
        end = m.end(1)
        spans.append(('paren', inner, start, end))

# Deduplicate by exact span positions
spans_sorted = sorted(spans, key=lambda x: x[2])
len(spans_sorted), spans_sorted[:10]

import json

text = open('/mnt/data/file-AdA74towX7aAnJqV92F1MK-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

entries = []

def add_aya(span_start, span_end, span_text, sura_name, sura_number, aya_number, corrected_text):
    entries.append({
        "span_start": span_start,
        "span_end": span_end,
        "span_text": span_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,  # assume false unless exact match
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": sura_name,
            "sura_number": sura_number,
            "aya_number": aya_number
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": corrected_text,
        "completely_invalid": False
    })

# Canonical texts (as recalled)
aya_31_12 = "وَلَقَدْ آتَيْنَا لُقْمَانَ الْحِكْمَةَ أَنِ اشْكُرْ لِلَّهِ ۚ وَمَنْ يَشْكُرْ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِ ۖ وَمَنْ كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ غَنِيٌّ حَمِيدٌ"
aya_31_13 = "وَإِذْ قَالَ لُقْمَانُ لِابْنِهِ وَهُوَ يَعِظُهُ يَا بُنَيَّ لَا تُشْرِكْ بِاللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّ الشِّرْكَ لَظُلْمٌ عَظِيمٌ"
aya_31_14 = "وَوَصَّيْنَا الْإِنسَانَ بِوَالِدَيْهِ ۖ حَمَلَتْهُ أُمُّهُ وَهْنًا عَلَىٰ وَهْنٍ وَفِصَالُهُ فِي عَامَيْنِ ۖ أَنِ اشْكُرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيْكَ ۖ إِلَيَّ الْمَصِيرُ"
aya_31_15 = "وَإِنْ جَاهَدَاكَ عَلَىٰ أَنْ تُشْرِكَ بِي مَا لَيْسَ لَكَ بِهِ عِلْمٌ فَلَا تُطِعْهُمَا وَصَاحِبْهُمَا فِي الدُّنْيَا مَعْرُوفًا ۖ وَاتَّبِعْ سَبِيلَ مَنْ أَنَابَ إِلَيَّ ۚ ثُمَّ إِلَيَّ مَرْجِعُكُمْ فَأُنَبِّئُكُمْ بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ"
aya_31_18 = "وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا ۖ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ"
aya_31_19 = "وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُضْ مِنْ صَوْتِكَ ۚ إِنَّ أَنْكَرَ الْأَصْوَاتِ لَصَوْتُ الْحَمِيرِ"
combined_18_19 = aya_31_18 + " " + aya_31_19

# Now add entries for selected spans:

# 31:13 quoted in main item 1
add_aya(141, 257, text[141:257], "لقمان", 31, 13, aya_31_13)

# 31:12 in item 2
add_aya(320, 474, text[320:474], "لقمان", 31, 12, aya_31_12)

# 31:14 in item 3
add_aya(534, 691, text[534:691], "لقمان", 31, 14, aya_31_14)

# 31:15 in item 4
add_aya(765, 996, text[765:996], "لقمان", 31, 15, aya_31_15)

# 31:18-19 messy long span
add_aya(1073, 1611, text[1073:1611], "لقمان", 31, 18, combined_18_19)

# Paren span likely 31:13
add_aya(1377, 1480, text[1377:1480], "لقمان", 31, 13, aya_31_13)

# Paren fragment "لاَ تُشْرِكْ بالله" (also 31:13) - correct to full ayah
add_aya(1755, 1775, text[1755:1775], "لقمان", 31, 13, aya_31_13)

# Paren fragment "إِنَّ الشرك لَظُلْمٌ عَظِيمٌ" (31:13) - correct to full ayah
add_aya(2127, 2157, text[2127:2157], "لقمان", 31, 13, aya_31_13)

# Ornate both verses 18-19
add_aya(2777, 3000, text[2777:3000], "لقمان", 31, 18, combined_18_19)

# Ornate partial 31:18
add_aya(3118, 3151, text[3118:3151], "لقمان", 31, 18, aya_31_18)

# Ornate partial 31:15
add_aya(3510, 3598, text[3510:3598], "لقمان", 31, 15, aya_31_15)

len(entries)

# Set is_valid True if exact match to canonical (for full verses), else False.
for e in entries:
    # Remove surrounding whitespace
    span = e["span_text"]
    # Get the candidate canonical for this entry (corrected_text)
    canon = e["corrected_text"]
    e["is_valid"] = (span == canon)
    
entries

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
